title: Microsoft Just Built Its Own AI — And It Beats OpenAI
script: Microsoft has paid OpenAI more than $13 billion since 2019. Today it announced something different. MAI-Thinking-1 is Microsoft's first in-house reasoning model — trained from scratch using zero OpenAI data. 35 billion active parameters. It scores 97 percent on AIME math benchmarks. Independent raters prefer it to Claude Sonnet in blind tests. It matches Opus on coding. Microsoft is no longer dependent on OpenAI.
